notes: Frame Generation (nvngx_dlssg.dll) was introduced with DLSS 3.0 (Sept 2022) — earlier versions don't ship this DLL.
Presets C/D/E are listed as deprecated in DLSS Swapper data and are not exposed in supported_presets.
Inheritance: for an unknown DLL version V, the largest entry with version <= V applies (semver compare).
